name: aether_translation_bridge_engine
description: High-reliability translation bridge for AetherCursor. Orchestrates Japanese-to-English translation using Gemma models (Google AI Studio). Features robust .env loading (local/parent), an authentication readiness probe (ping), and consistent JSON error reporting for seamless Node.js bridge integration. Ideal for complex multi-language prompting scenarios.
test_code:
import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch

def test_translation_logic_mocked():
    from aether_tools.translator import translate_text
    
    with patch("aether_tools.translator.get_client") as mock_get:
        mock_client = MagicMock()
        mock_get.return_value = mock_client
        
        mock_response = MagicMock()
        mock_response.text = "Hello (Must respond in Japanese)"
        mock_client.models.generate_content.return_value = mock_response
        
        result = translate_text("こんにちは")
        assert "Hello" in result
        assert "(Must respond in Japanese)" in result
